description_long: This handbag features a rectangular body with a structured silhouette and a flap closure. The exterior is adorned with a vibrant, multicolored pattern resembling abstract brushstrokes in shades of orange, black, and pink, giving it a striking and artistic appearance. The bag has a short, sturdy handle on top, as well as a longer, detachable strap for shoulder or crossbody wear. The sides and bottom of the bag are solid black, providing contrast to the colorful front and back panels. Metal hardware accents are visible at the strap attachments, adding a touch of sophistication. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments.
description: A structured, rectangular handbag with a colorful abstract pattern, black accents, and both a top handle and a long strap.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the bag, the curved long strap, and the top handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the abstract patterned flap, black side panels, and the top handle centered above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the strap and handle from the other side.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the patterned panel, black side panels, and the long strap draped outward.
attribute_strap_type: One short top handle and one long, detachable shoulder/crossbody strap attached at the sides with metal hardware.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Flap closure located on the front, likely secured with a magnetic snap or similar mechanism.
attribute_pattern: Abstract multicolored brushstroke pattern in orange, black, pink, and white.
